follow_ups.title: Add production service supervision for Qwen3 MLX HTTP backend
follow_ups.reason: The first Swift adapter should connect to an already running local service. Automatic launch, restart, lifecycle policy, and LaunchAgent packaging need a separate contract.

follow_ups.title: Define technical-term correction strategy for Qwen3 code-switch dictation
follow_ups.reason: The extended Qwen3 HTTP gate passed timing and safety checks, but long code-switch technical-term WER remains high enough to need hotword, prompt, or final-correction work.
